findings.title: Missing verification evidence
findings.rationale: The change updates repository configuration parsing but the review notes do not name a parser test, typecheck, or config validation command that was run.
findings.suggestedFix: Run the focused config loader tests and include the command in the review summary.

findings.title: Documentation overclaims current behavior
findings.rationale: The new guide describes hosted policy distribution even though the current implementation only supports local policy pack paths.
findings.suggestedFix: Describe hosted distribution as future work or remove the claim.
